arts.ttl: Justin Kluivert lauded as he eclipses famous father Patrick at Newcastle
arts.sum: The 25-year-old’s dad scored only one Premier League goal at St James’ Park.

arts.ttl: Newcastle fail to intimidate Bournemouth as Cherries run riot at St James' Park
arts.sum: NEWCASTLE 1-4 BOURNEMOUTH: This was supposed to be about Newcastle setting records, about Alexander Isak. Not about injury-ravaged Bournemouth. But Iraola is a manager who does not follow the scripts

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe makes Newcastle United team sheet confession after Bournemouth battering
arts.sum: Eddie Howe felt that fatigue was a factor in Newcastle United's 4-1 defeat at home to AFC Bournemouth - but the head coach did not want to "make excuses" after the humbling loss. Howe's team were within touching distance of a club record of 10 wins in a row but they never looked capable of netting it after going behind early in the game .

arts.ttl: Isak's Premier League scoring run ends abruptly
arts.sum: Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak's Premier League scoring run is finally over, leaving Jamie Vardy's record safe for now.

arts.ttl: Howe hails Isak's 'composure' as striker scores again
arts.sum: Newcastle United head coach Eddie Howe praises the "composure and finishing" of Alexander Isak, who scored twice in a 3-0 Premier League win against Wolves - the Magpies' ninth successive win.
Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe believes "fatigue" played a huge role in his side's 4-1 defeat to Nournemouth at St James' Park in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe calls for instant inquest as Magpies blitzed by Bournemouth
arts.sum: Joelinton picked up a yellow card in the clash against Bournemouth and had to be pulled away from trouble at half-time by Jason Tindall. This time Semenyo broke down the left, and his reverse path picked out Justin Kluivert, who swept home the opener.

arts.ttl: Newcastle spending power gives them 35% chance of transfer – ‘Very interested’ in player
arts.sum: Newcastle United are ‘very interested’ in striker Stefanos Tzimas and have a 35% chance of getting him this summer. That’s according to BILD, who say Newcastle are currently in second place when it comes to Premier League interest in the 19-year-old. Tzimas has been impressing on loan at Nuremberg this season. He has eight goals The post Newcastle spending power gives them 35% chance of transfer – ‘Very interested’ in player appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Justin Kluivert gives ‘lovely’ reaction to stunning Bournemouth hat-trick vs Newcastle
arts.sum: Justin Kluivert scored his second hat-trick of the season for Bournemouth to put Newcastle United to the sword at St. James’ Park on Saturday. The Dutchman found the target with a pair of tidy finishes in the opening half either side of a Bruno Guimaraes equaliser. He followed that up with a stunning strike in […] The post Justin Kluivert gives ‘lovely’ reaction to stunning Bournemouth hat-trick vs Newcastle first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak's scoring run in Premier League ends at 8 games. Jamie Vardy's record safe for now
arts.sum: The Sweden international had scored in eight straight games before failing to find the net in Newcastle’s 4-1 loss to Bournemouth on Saturday. Ruud van Nistelrooy (Manchester United), March-August 2003
